assumptions: Figure caption is taken as authoritative for the projection type label.
Scale bar on the figure is assumed to be accurate to the published edition.

distortion_assumptions: Edge distortion at icosahedron seams is not represented in the flat map.
Area preservation is approximate; this projection prioritizes shape over area.
Continental coastline accuracy varies by edition and has not been independently verified.

non_claims: This receipt does not claim the Dymaxion projection is superior to other projections.
Human review provides indicative replay only; exact re-extraction is not possible from a figure.
This receipt does not claim geographic accuracy of the underlying source figure.
